import ast, sys
files = [
    'app.py',
    'run_experiments.py',
    'utils/plot_style.py',
    'pipelines/mobilenet_classifier.py',
    'pipelines/severity_regression.py',
    'pipelines/embedding_anomaly.py',
    'pipelines/entropy_drift.py',
    'pipelines/texture_svm.py',
    'studies/robustness.py',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  ✓ {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'  ✗ {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")
